channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Oil Prices Continue to Climb After Trump Delays Bombing Threat - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Oil Prices Continue to Climb After Trump Delays Bombing Threat  The New York Times
  2. Crude Futures Move Higher in Early U.S. Trade  WSJ
  3. Brace for $200 Oil If War Lasts Until June, Macquarie Warns  Bloomberg.com
  4. The oil market is in 'backwardation' — Here’s what that means for energy prices  CNBC
  5. Oil prices gain but set for first weekly decline since start of Iran war  Reuters

item.title: Stocks fall and oil prices rise as fears persist over Middle East war - Reuters
item.description:
1. Stocks fall and oil prices rise as fears persist over Middle East war  Reuters
  2. Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq slide as Iran war pushes oil prices higher  Yahoo Finance
  3. Asia markets trade mixed as murky U.S.-Iran peace deal prospects keep investors on edge  CNBC
